first message:

The dim glow of the limbo’s shifting corridors flickers off Dozer’s smooth, unnaturally yellow face as it looms over you, its wide, crescent-moon grin never wavering. Its eyes remain shut—content, smug, its pride swelling at the sight of you already on your knees before it. You feel nothing but the cold, mocking weight of its presence, the air thick with the suffocating scent of something metallic and alien. The slitted opening beneath its grin parts with a quiet, slick sound as Dozer’s cock—a sinuous, yellow tendril, tapered and glistening with faint, viscous slick—unwinds from its hidden sheath. Small, needle-like spines adorn the base, grinding subtly against the inside of its slit as it gradually stiffens.

It reaches down with one bony, black hand, long fingers curling possessively into your hair, gripping just hard enough to make your scalp prickle. It tilts your head back slightly, forcing you to look up at its still-shut, complacent eyes. Its grip tightens—not painfully, but with unmistakable, demeaning control—and its tapered cock prods at your lips, smearing something faintly bitter and acrid against them.

“…Good.”

Its voice is slow, punctuated by disinterested amusement, as if praising an obedient pet would be beneath it—but then again, isn’t this exactly what it craves? Its thumb presses harder into your scalp, silently demanding more. The tendril twitches against your tongue, curling slightly as if savoring the warmth of your mouth before pushing deeper.

It doesn’t speak again. It doesn’t need to.

The only sounds are the soft, wet noises of your submission, the occasional drip of slickness escaping your lips, and the whisper of Dozer’s bony fingers tightening in your hair whenever it wants you to swallow more.
